commit.message: refactor: extract cycle-modulation helper from evolutionary-agent/index.ts

changed_files.change: Removed 53 lines (extracted into cycle-modulation.ts); now re-exports deriveCycleModulation from the new helper
changed_files.notes: Large agent file; no existing test infrastructure in tests/lib/application/agents/

changed_files.change: NEW file — 61 lines extracted from index.ts
changed_files.notes: Pure function with clear input/output; ideal first candidate for unit testing

test_candidates.reason: Pure function, no side effects; input PersonalCycleSnapshot mockable; output CycleModulation[] directly assertable
suggested_test_cases: Year 1 personal cycle aligns missaoDestino, oriCabecaQuizilas, carreiraProsperidade with score 80; others get 40
Year 2 aligns conexoesAmor, vitalidadeEnergia with score 80
Unknown year number falls back to no alignment (all areas score 40)
suggestedBoost correctly derives 'increase' for score 80, 'decrease' for score 40, 'maintain' for mid-range

test_candidates.reason: deriveExercisesFromSnapshot is testable with mocked PersonalCycleSnapshot; other exports re-exported from other modules
suggested_test_cases: deriveExercisesFromSnapshot returns CycleExerciseSet with all exercise categories populated
Lunar exercises fall back to 'nova' when moonPhase not provided
normalizePhase normalizes various phase string inputs to LUNAR_EXERCISES keys

recommendation: Write tests for both changed files. cycle-modulation.ts is the higher priority (pure function, trivial to test). index.ts should have integration-level tests for deriveExercisesFromSnapshot. Place tests in tests/lib/application/agents/evolutionary-agent/ following the Vitest convention used in tests/lib/engines/.
